description: Legal query in the hand of Berakhot b. Shemuel with the responsum of Menahem b. Yiṣḥaq. The question deals with a woman who had permitted her husband to give a house belonging to her personally as collateral for a debt. When the husband died without having paid the debt, the judge Menahem b. Yiṣḥaq b. Sasson had no option but to decide that her property was forfeited. This query belongs to a well known case, see Friedman, “The Inheritance of a Man with Two Wives: Two Responsa from the Geniza” (Heb.) Dine Israel 13-14 (1986-88), 245-262. See also Mediterranean Society, III, p. 255)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
